key_findings: Institutional Quant Trading 2026 (13th unique domain): Aeron Sequencer replicated state machine, Hot/History path split (Aeron+QuestDB), FinRL-X weight-centric architecture, CoinAPI modular GPT agents with MCP, FIX 4.4/5.0 SP2 standard. Performance: order <100μs, e2e <500μs. DORA/MiFID II/MiCA compliance mandates.

LLM Factor Mining Industry Validation 2026: 东吴证券 LLM Alpha158 +30% improvement, 广发证券 CogAlpha replication (IC 2.15-2.95%), 华安证券 EvoAlpha validation. CogAlpha ACL 2026 Oral confirmed as gold standard. Alpha Jungle (AAAI 2026 LLM+MCTS), QuantEvolver (RFT), AlphaCrafter (full-stack), FactorEngine (program-level), QuantaAlpha (GPT-5.2 IC=0.1501).
2026 consensus: code-level factors > formula, multi-agent > single LLM, evolutionary search > static generation, feedback-as-learning (RFT) > prompt accumulation.
research.note: Queries returned 10+ independent sources each. Institutional quant domain mix of academic (AAAI/ACL/NeurIPS), commercial (Adaptive/Aeron, CoinAPI, FinRL-X), and regulatory (DORA/MiFID II). Factor mining domain validated by both academic venues and Chinese securities firms (东吴/广发/华安) — rare convergence of theory and practice.
